title: Build features with confidence
subtitle: This example page reads translations from app/features/docs/locales/en.json and renders a feature-first docs experience.

quickStart.title: Quick start
quickStart.description: Create a feature folder, define your types first, then wire the store, composable, and component in small steps.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Keep pages thin. Put business logic in composables and state in Pinia stores so views stay clean and predictable.

i18n.title: Feature locales
i18n.description: Place translations in app/features/docs/locales/en.json so the i18n plugin can merge them under docs.* keys.
